creator: mr@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

BTW:

===>   nextcloudclient-3.4.0 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found

fetch: https://codeload.github.com/nextcloud/desktop/tar.gz/v3.4.0?dummy=/nextcloud-desktop-v3.4.0_GH0.tar.gz: Not Found
=> Attempting to fetch http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/nextcloud-desktop-v3.4.0_GH0.tar.gz
fetch: http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/nextcloud-desktop-v3.4.0_GH0.tar.gz: Not Found
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /usr/ports/distfiles/ and try again.
*** Error code 1

It seems not downloadable also.
